title: Easy Coin System
description: This is a easy coin system for trading, paying, and selling in Minecraft.
body:
# **Chickoin: The Ultimate In-Game Economy Mod!**

## **Greetings, Adventurer!**

Tired of simple bartering? Dive into a **fully functional economic system** that brings sophisticated banking, secure storage, and even a bit of risk to your Minecraft world! **Chickoin** is more than just a currency—it's the complete infrastructure you need to build and manage your wealth. Get ready to trade, save, and secure your funds!

## 💰 **Core Economic Features**

**The Chickoin Currency**: Our visually refreshed currency is the new standard for wealth! Use Chickoins for all **player-to-player trading and payments**.

**The Wallet**: A safe and portable inventory slot for carrying your hard-earned Chickoins anywhere you go.

**The Secure Safe**: Protect your valuables! This high-security storage unit is secured with a **personal password**, ensuring only you can access your savings. The safe features a **robust, secure design**.

**The Classic ATM**: We've designed a reliable **MinecraftCard-ATM system** from the ground up. Use your **MinecraftCard** to seamlessly **deposit or withdraw** your Chickoins.

## 🛍️ **Brand New: Vendor Stalls! (Creative Only!)**
Bring organized commerce to your world with our new market blocks, **only available in Creative Mode**:

The **Food Shop** and The **Ore Shop** allow players to quickly buy essential goods.

**Flexible Trading**: Stall prices are **fully customizable after placement**, and payments can be made using both the **MinecraftCard** or physical **Chickoins**!

## ⚠️ **High-Risk Specialty Banking (Creative Only!)**

For map creators and adventurous players, we offer powerful, modified ATMs with built-in risks. These machines are **only available in Creative Mode** for balancing purposes.

**The Hacked ATM (**👤**)**: Beware! This sneaky machine will **steal all the money** from your MinecraftCard if you aren't quick enough.

**The Exploding ATM (**💥**)**: Don't try to rob it! This explosive machine will **detonate and harm you** if you attempt to break it.

**The Broken ATM (**❗**)**: A gamble! This unpredictable ATM may sometimes **deposit or withdraw the wrong amount** of Chickoins.

**The Unbreakable ATM (**♾️**)**: A true fortress. It's **completely unbreakable** and will actually **deal damage** to anyone who tries to mine it.


**We hope you enjoy building your economic empire!**

_(Made with MCreator)_
